changelog.title: Release notes
changelog.panelHint: Newest release at the top. Opening this panel marks updates as read.

versions.headline: Rotom forms move fix
items: Fixed Rotom appliance forms (Heat/Wash/Frost/Fan/Mow) not displaying learnable moves

versions.headline: Battle utilities
items: Speed compare: your team vs opponent (6+6) with no-EV / max Speed / +Spe nature columns
Damage calculator: Lv.50, nature & 66 EVs, type chart & STAB (MVP, no items/abilities yet)

versions.headline: Team export
items: Team Builder: export teams as Pokémon Showdown (PS) paste format

speedCompare.title: Speed compare
speedCompare.subtitle: Your side vs opponent, up to six each (including Mega forms); the table uses the same speed-tier assumptions and sorts results.
speedCompare.formulaNote: Same as Speed tiers: no EV = base+20, max Speed = base+52, +Speed nature = floor(max×1.1). Only Pokémon with synced base Speed are listed.
speedCompare.emptyHint: Pick at least one Pokémon on either side (requires synced base Speed in the roster).

damageCalc.title: Damage Calculator
damageCalc.subtitle: Champions Lv.50 battle: abilities, weather, terrain, screens, items, rank, crit, status, Stealth Rock.
damageCalc.noDamage: This move cannot be scored (status or missing power).
damageCalc.needAll: Choose attacker, defender, and a damaging move.
damageCalc.noLearnableMoves: No learnset data yet—try another Pokémon or try again later.
damageCalc.defEvHint: Auto-matched to {stat} based on move category

pokemon.natureNeutral: {name}: All non-HP stats have ×1.0 multiplier, no boost or reduction

about.title: About the Creator
about.subtitle: Meet the developer behind Poké Champions
about.bio: Passionate about Pokémon and web development. Built Poké Champions so every trainer can easily look up Champions data and plan the best team.

idea.title: Inspiration
idea.desc: Frustrated by scattered Champions data, decided to build an integrated tool.

tech.title: Tech Stack
tech.desc: Frontend: Vue 3 + Vite. Backend: Spring Boot + PostgreSQL. Deployed on GCP.

data.title: Data Integration
data.desc: Automated scraping and syncing of official Champions roster, moves, and types.

launch.title: Launch
launch.desc: Continuously optimizing UI and performance for the best trainer experience.

about.thanksText: Thanks to all Pokémon trainers for your support and feedback, and to PokeAPI and the official Champions data.
about.disclaimer: This is an unofficial fan project, not affiliated with The Pokémon Company. All Pokémon-related names and images are trademarks and copyrights of their respective owners.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.overviewText: Poké Champions values your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use this website.
privacy.dataCollectionText1: We do not require registration or personal identification. However, our hosting service and analytics tools may automatically collect the following anonymous data when you browse:
privacy.dataCollectionText2: This data is used only to improve website performance and user experience.

dataItems.ip: IP address (automatically logged by hosting service)

privacy.cookiesText1: This site uses Google Analytics for anonymous traffic statistics, which sets cookies on your device.
privacy.cookiesText2: Additionally, this site uses browser localStorage to save team-building preferences. This data stays on your device and is not sent to any server.
privacy.adsText1: This site may display ads via Google AdSense. Google may use cookies to serve ads based on your visits to this and other websites.
privacy.adsText2: You can manage personalized ad preferences through Google Ad Settings.
privacy.externalLinksText: This site may contain links to external websites. We are not responsible for the privacy policies or content of those sites.
privacy.childrenText: This site is not targeted at children under 13, and we do not knowingly collect personal information from children.
privacy.changesText: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Updated versions will be posted on this page with a revised "Last Updated" date.
privacy.contactText: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact us via the About page.

speedTiers.title: Speed tiers
speedTiers.subtitle: Uses synced base stats from this site’s roster. Tier bands follow common reference charts: grouped by base Speed stat (not by the computed +Spe value). Cards still show No EVs / Max / +Spe for lineups.
speedTiers.formulaNote: Matches common sheets: max Speed assumes 252 Speed EVs, 31 Speed IV, neutral nature; +Speed uses a boosting nature on Speed.
speedTiers.abilitySectionDesc: Includes Swift Swim, Chlorophyll, Sand Rush, Slush Rush, plus Midday Lycanroc (Sand Rush in sand), Hawlucha and Sneasler (Unburden after consuming an item—the ×2 columns are for comparison with weather doubling). “Max×2” = 2×(base+52); “+Spe×2” = floor(Max×2×1.1). Rows that do not use a ×2 Speed effect (single-line reference only) show “—” in the ×2 columns. Rows are sorted by effective top speed: +Spe×2 when doubling applies, otherwise +Spe. Rows are hidden if the form is not in the roster.
